GigaCode Documentation
=======================

Welcome to the GigaCode documentation! GigaCode is a local-only semantic code search and embedding tool powered by GPU-accelerated vector search and language model embeddings.

**Key Features:**

- 🚀 GPU-accelerated embeddings (sub-millisecond search on GPU)
- 📚 Support for 8+ programming languages
- 🔍 Semantic code search with hybrid matching
- 💾 Automatic code buffer management
- 📊 Clustering and duplicate detection
- 🔐 Local-only execution (no cloud, no network)

**Getting Started:**

If you're new to GigaCode, start with the :doc:`quick_start` guide to set up and run your first search.

**User Guides:**

Learn how to use GigaCode effectively:
